channel.title: Stream on Kevin wang's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Stream on Kevin wang's blog

item.title: Java Stream internals
item.description: java.util.stream.Stream is the public face of Java 8’s functional-style aggregate operations. Under the hood it is not a data structure — it is a lazy pipeline of linked stages backed by a Spliterator source. Intermediate operations such as filter and map only extend the pipeline; computation begins when a terminal operation such as collect or forEach triggers evaluation. This document traces the OpenJDK implementation centered on Stream, its pipeline machinery, and how elements flow from source to result.
